review_title: Visualize the metrics before the downtime
author: Jignesh P.
pros: you can see the real-time utilization of the resources and visualize the charts which help you to identify the problems in early stage. You can setup the alarms based on your required criteria.
cons: The CloudWatch dashboard is a little complex for beginners. You should have a basic knowledge of AWS to use CloudWatch services. You always need expert's help to understand the cost.

description: It's a good solution and makes managing and monitoring most amazon services and some external ones accurate.
author: Ash B.
pros: The wide range of options and granularity your able to set on monitors and alerts allows accurate data to be served.
cons: It can be complex to setup and there should be some easier options to start with and build from for some use cases.

review_title: Integration within AWS is great, cost transparency is poor, dashboards are a thumbs down
description: Overall, there's better monitoring software out there. The dashboards are not visually appealing. I would like to see more cost transparency. I do like the integrations with the other AWS services like ECS and WAF.
author: ☁️ 👩‍💻 M G.
pros: I like the integrations. For example, the integration between AWS ECS and memory utilization CloudWatch alarms. Another example, I like the integration between CloudWatch insights and WAFs logs. That is helpful.
cons: AWS has great services, but CloudWatch isn't one of them. It is noisy, and cannot mute scaling instances/containers automatically. There's better monitoring/observability software out there. Also, CloudWatch is probably one of the more expensive AWS services out there. I would like to see more transparency on where these CloudWatch costs are coming from. I do not like the dashboard prices. Visualization isn't sleek.

description: Overall experience is good, since all operation happened on AWS will have logs in amazon cloudwatch system.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: All our aws monitoring dashboard are built from cloudwatch, all lambdas, KMS, RDS have cloudwatch logs, you can turn it on for each operation can check what happens for that operation, it is very easy to use and learn how to query what you need.
cons: Again, I think they should introduce new AI powered tool to help you find what you need from millions of cloud watch logs instead each time I have to select log group and construct my query to find my data.

review_title: Amazon CloudWathc - Great Product For The AWS Ecosystem
description: Great! I love the way that it works! I love it!
author: Kyle R.
pros: Really easy to track my AWS cloud servers. Makes automation easy to track logs.
cons: Is pretty clunky and has a steeper learning curve

description: My overall experience with the aws cloudwatch service has been positive. Its been an reliable tool for monitoring and logging, giving me an valuable insights into my applications and infrastructure.It has helped me keep track of performance and quickly troubleshoot any issues.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Amazon CloudWatch provides detailed metrics and real-time data that assist in optimizing cloud utilization and monitoring apps effectively. It offers robust integration with AWS services, enabling automation through alarms and metrics and facilitating resource scaling and task automation. CloudWatch simplifies logging by collecting logs from various sources like Lambda and providing a single dashboard for comprehensive monitoring and analysis. Its reliability and ease of setup make it a preferred choice for both cloud and on-premises resources, with technical support rated highly by users. The service helps in cost savings as an inbuilt solution for AWS, offering essential monitoring features without requiring additional setup or maintenance.
cons: Amazon CloudWatch lacks features such as real-time data stream monitoring and application performance monitoring, requiring third-party tools for comprehensive monitoring. The search functionality is limited, lacking advanced search capabilities and fuzzy matching, which hampers efficient issue tracking and troubleshooting. Log streaming in Amazon CloudWatch is slow, often taking up to 24 hours, and requires an external setup with Kibana or Splunk for faster performance. Alerts and alerting mechanisms in Amazon CloudWatch need to be more flexible, as current configurations are limited and not user-friendly. Amazon CloudWatch's pricing, particularly for custom metrics, is considered high and lacks a straightforward approach to pricing improvements.

review_title: Effective for Metrics and Alarms, but Log search needs some improvments
description: In overall, its not bad because its 'pay as you go' and some free tier for basic monitoring. We are utilizing lots of alarms to monitor specific metrics and notifications when it hits its thresholds. Also we can create customized dashboard showing all metrics in real time.
author: Jitae K.
pros: Most useful and great feature for our use-case is Logs and Metrics. We been using those features since we deployed lambda/ECS/RDS. It is cost-effective and good integration with all other aws services.
cons: especially for log search, its almost useless. There is a function, "Search all log streams" in Log events and when I type some strings in search bar, it always show nothing in results even though logs has that strings. Also, it takes forever to search some strings in log events

review_title: Great for AWS Metrics, UI Could Be Better
description: Overall experience is great. The way I can create alerts , alarms has helped me a lot in production. I have been using it from past 2 years and I am satisfied.
author: sirjan B.
pros: What I liked most about Amazon CloudWatch is how seamlessly it integrates with other AWS services. It made it really easy to set up custom metrics, dashboards, and alarms without needing extra tools. The real-time monitoring and the ability to dive into logs when something goes wrong were super helpful for troubleshooting and keeping everything running smoothly.
cons: The pricing can be a bit confusing, especially when dealing with high-volume logs or custom metrics. Also, the UI feels a bit clunky at times—it works, but navigating between logs, metrics, and alarms isn’t as smooth as it could be.

author: Flavio M.
pros: Great and reliable tool that integrate with other AWS services. Been using it daily to monitor user’s behaviour and also to look after possible bugs. The ease of use is great with loads of filters features that allow me do my job quickly and efficiently.
cons: Sometimes the logs can take a while to load. Also I don’t think we would need to hit “load more to see older or newer events.

description: My overall experience with Amazon CloudWatch is that it provides valuable insights and monitoring capabilities for AWS resources and applications, but requires careful configuration and cost management to maximize its benefits.
author: Amaya A.
pros: Amazon CloudWatch provides real-time monitoring and insights into AWS resources and applications, enabling users to detect anomalies, troubleshoot issues, and optimize performance.
cons: Some users find Amazon CloudWatch's complexity and cost management challenging, particularly when dealing with high-volume metric and log data, which can lead to increased expenses and require careful optimization.

description: Overall, it’s a powerful monitoring and observability tool. Once you understand how to use it, CloudWatch offers incredible value in managing and optimizing application performance. It’s become essential in my workflow for tracking logs and metrics.
author: Chris N.
pros: I really appreciated how seamlessly CloudWatch integrated with other AWS services. The real-time monitoring, customizable dashboards, and detailed logs made it much easier to detect issues early and keep track of system health.
cons: The pricing model can be a bit confusing at first, especially with custom metrics. It’s also not the most intuitive interface for beginners — a bit of a learning curve if you’re new to AWS monitoring tools.

author: Rozelyn B.
pros: I would like to highlight its comprehensive monitoring capabilities and ease of use. I greatly appreciate the real-time monitoring, customizable dashboards, and automated alerts that help maintain system health and performance.
cons: However, just aq heads up the tool can be complex to set up and may require time to learn its full capabilities. The pricing model can also be confusing, with costs potentially escalating with extensive data ingestion or high-resolution metrics.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Cloud watch has increased our application performance 10 fold
author: Will M.
pros: CloudWatch being able to give me all the logs and alarms and notifications is just what i love
cons: I have never had one single issue with amazon Cloud watch. It Just works

description: No complaints except the speed of the feature. I remember it took a moment for the home to load. But, it is hardly an issue
author: Carolina R.
pros: The user-friendly platform and how easy it is to find the features. Also, it has a great presentation.
cons: Can be a little slow sometimes. I remember it took a moment for the home to load. But, it is hardly an issue. I am aware that other factors may cause that like the many apps I have on my device.

description: The overall experience is very good, and I use it very often. I recommend it to everyone who are using Amazon web services.
author: Sehani S.
pros: I like this most because, using this it can be easy to spot errors and actions had been taken in the app and its time
cons: It is in the format that have time and description which is not that beginners can understand. To read logs, person require an experience first.

description: Overall Experience is positive with these things. 1. CloudWatch Excels at offering detailed insights into aws resources. 2. Customize dashboard as per need it is a versatile solution for monitoring for simplify observation and insights of operations.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: CloudWatch Alarms are highly configurable. When Any thresholds are breached sends Notifications that enable quick response to an issue. Seamless integration with Aws services
cons: CloudWatch Pricing structure can become confusing and expensive especially when dealing with high metrics, logs and alarms. Dashboard are customizable but built-in visualization are so basic.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Comprehensive tool for monitoring our AWS resources
description: Overall, my experience with Amazon CloudWatch has been very good. It is a powerful tool for monitoring and troubleshooting AWS resources and has helped us get some valuable insights.
author: Ravi K.
pros: The thing I like the most about Amazon CloudWatch is the ability to create custom dashboards. These dashboards help me visualize data and give valuable insights to my company.
cons: It can get really expensive really quick if you are monitoring a lot of resources, and we ended up overspending on something we were just testing out.

review_title: Good tool to monitor AWS resources
description: Here’s a more relaxed version: Overall, I think CloudWatch is pretty solid. It’s good for keeping track of things and works well with other AWS stuff. The learning curve and pricing can be a bit annoying sometimes, but it gets the job done and helps me stay on top of things.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: A centralised Dashboard to view and monitor all of my resources from one place. It is easy to set up Cloud Watch with multiple AWS resources, such as EC2 instances, ECS instances, and RDS database instances.
cons: Some of the advanced features, like custom metrics, took a little while to figure out.

description: My overall experience is great & this is something that helps important resources and allows users to focus on "building applications and business value"
author: Nelson F.
pros: Its a great platform & is extremely helpful. It helps you collect, track, and analyze metrics, logs, and events. That helps stay organized.
cons: Everything is great about Amazon CloudWatch. It enables you to proactively identify and address issues. That helps stay more efficient
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience USING Amazon CloudWatch has been mainly positive. That being said, taking the cost into account, I don't know that this would be my first choice in the future.
author: WILLIAM E.
pros: The way Amazon CloudWatch lets the user set alarms and automated actions is a wonderfully useful feature.
cons: While the cost is a major downside to Amazon CloudWatch, the biggest con in my opinion is the complexity when trying to manage larger deployments.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sabina D.
pros: Good functionality. Very easy to use. Love the design and simplicity. Make my life easier. I also like how simple the app design is as well.
cons: I wish the app worked faster sometimes as it sometimes lags. Everything else is good. I don’t have any issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: When you hear the name 'Amazon', you think of cutting-edge software and advancements, but Amazon CloudWatch falls short. It offers capabilities that you can find through other software, and it doesn't provide anything that stands out.
author: Raqel A.
pros: The grey color scheme is easy on the eyes, and you can find everything you need on the main screen.
cons: It's not easy to use or understand if you've never used it before. You'd have to do some troubleshooting to understand what you're seeing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Reliable tool for tracking performance and troubleshooting across AWS resources.
author: Ricardo L.
pros: Real-time monitoring, customizable dashboards, and seamless AWS integration.
cons: Pricing can get high with detailed metrics and logs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stéphane N.
pros: I was able to capture metrics of my EC2 instances every minute and take action quickly if necessary.
cons: It is imperative to install the CloudWatch agent on instances using my custom AMI.

description: my overall experience is very good with AmazonCloudwatch i will recommend everyone to use it and once we use it we cant stop using it because of its rich set of features.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Realtime monitoring the infrastructure using various metrics help to analyse the situationn its best thing i liked.
cons: there is no such thing which i did not like in this product.
